violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the receiving door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2026

The door to the outside, located in the on the loading dock, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025
The door handle on the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to areas of food prep/service must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025
